channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Turkey vs Paraguay: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Turkey vs Paraguay for free online and from anywhere in Group D of the FIFA World Cup 2026, as both sides seek their first points.

item.title: 'What makes a CV stand out is the personal touch you add to it': Even professional CV writers are warning not to use AI to write a resume
item.description: Perfect text, exaggerated skills and inaccurate information are telltale signs of AI-generated resumes, but there are benefits.

item.title: Avoid roaming charges and streaming geo-blocks at the World Cup with these eSIM and VPN bundles
item.description: Get ready to travel to the 2026 FIFA World Cup securely with these eSIM and VPN bundle offers

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, June 20 (game #1608)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, June 20 (game #1105)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, June 20 (game #839)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: A key US data center law covering security and sustainability is set to lapse worryingly soon, with no sign of a replacement
item.description: A federal data center law covering security and sustainability may expire soon as AI infrastructure expansion increases regulatory pressure nationwide.

item.title: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
item.description: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.
